hooks.command: case "$TOOL_INPUT" in *tenant-config.json*) echo 'This edits tenant-config.json — the central config that drives all scripts. Confirm this change is intentional.' >&2; exit 2;; esac
echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.(env|pfx|pem|key)"' && { echo 'BLOCKED: Writing credential/secret files (.env, .pfx, .pem, .key) is not allowed.' >&2; exit 1; }; exit 0
